description_long: This is a standard hand screwdriver featuring a cylindrical, faceted handle made of red plastic with black streaks and visible signs of wear. The handle is straight and ergonomically shaped for grip, with subtle grooves running vertically to enhance handling. The shaft is metallic and dark in color, extending from the handle and terminating in a pointed tip. The tip is shaped for Phillips screws, with a cross-slot profile visible in some views. The overall appearance suggests frequent use, as evidenced by the scuffed and scratched surface of the handle. No brand markings or logos are visible on any part of the object.
description: A well-used red plastic-handled screwdriver with a dark metal Phillips tip and visible wear on the handle.
description_view_0: The screwdriver is shown with its red, faceted handle and the pointed Phillips tip facing downward; black streaks and wear are visible on the handle.
description_view_1: This view highlights the cross-shaped Phillips tip and the vertical grooves on the handle, with wear marks more apparent.
description_view_2: The screwdriver is seen from a similar angle as view 0, again showing the pointed tip and the worn, streaked handle.
description_view_3: The Phillips tip is clearly visible, and the handle's red color with black streaks and scuffs is prominent.
attribute_handle_type: straight, faceted, red plastic handle with vertical grooves for grip and visible wear
attribute_visible_wear_or_damage: Visible scratches, scuffs, and discoloration on the handle; no major dents or cracks
